name: Molasses Whoopies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jan Cargill
Sift dry ingredients and set aside. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening with sugar until light. Beat in eggs, then stir in molasses. Add the dry ingredient mixture. Drop tablespoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for approximately 10 minutes (or until lightly browned). After cooling, fill with the following filling: 3/4 cup butter, 1/4 cup shortening, 1/4 cup molasses, 1/2 cup sugar (or to taste), 1/2 teaspoon Ginger, and 3 Tablespoons Milk. Beat together the butter, shortening, sugar, and ginger until creamy. Gradually beat in milk and molasses. Fill cookies. If desired, wrap in wax paper and freeze.
